titleStmt.title: SII 8.266: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 266. (A.R. No. 661 of 1902). ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī komāṟupaṉmar tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekaratevarkku yāṇṭu 3 10 4vatu kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟu pūrvvapakṣattu tritiyaiyyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa makattu nāḷ rājendracoḻavaḷanāṭṭu puṟaṅkarampai nāṭṭu Akaram śrīmuṭivaḻaṅkucoḻaccaturvvedimaṅkalattu muṭivaḻaṅkucoḻaviṇṇakar Emperumāṉ tirumuṟṟattu śrīsenāpatiĀḻvār śrīpaṇ
ṭārattāṟku Ivvūr komaṭattu Uyyakkoṇṭāṉbhaṭṭaṉ bhāryyai Eṅkaḷ tamaiyaṉār komapuṟattu keśavabhaṭṭa sarvvakratuyājiyārai mutukaṇṇākaUṭaiya kaṟpakaṅkoṇṭiccāṉiyen dharmmadāṉapramāṇa Icaivutiṭṭu . Ivvūril Eṅkaḷukku sādhāraṇamāy muṉṉāḷ paṟṟiliyāykkiṭanta nilamāṉa koḻuntaṉāḻvār taṉper nāṭṭik kāṇiEṟaṭṭu paṟṟukiṟa nāḷil Eṅkaḷai kūṭṭāte paṟṟiyilāy ścedam peṟukaiyāle kaṭamaiIṟukkai Āḻvāṟke paramākaiyā
l Ivaṉ kaṭamai Iṟāte poy Ivaṉ perkaṭamaikku puṇaippaṭṭa śrīgovindapperumāḷ Innāyaṉārkku Ivaṉ perkaṭamaikku viṟṟa nilaṅkaḷil Eṉ bharttāviṉ kūṟāy Eṉṉutāna Oṉṟupātiyil Ivaṉ viṟṟa nilam 1/80 + 1/160 + 1/320 kiṟā 1/8kkum Okka Ivvūril nikki Uḷḷa nilaṅkaḷil Āṟṟūrkūṟṟile tirunāmattukkāṇiyākap paṟṟikkoḷḷavum nāṉ Iṉnāyaṉāṟku dharmmadā ṉamāka kuṭutta nilamāvatu piṭākai coḻaṇukkanallūr śrīdevivatikku meṟkut tiruvaraṅkavākkālukkut teṟku 4 2catirattu Āṟṟukku meṟku
ppaṭṭa nilattu 1/320m 2 1catirattu śrīgovindapperumāḷ vilaiyāl tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa nilattu Eṉ ṉopātiyāy nāṉ kuṭutta nilam 1/80 + � + 1/320m Ivvatikkuk kiḻakku Ivvākkālukkut teṟku 1 1caturattu Eṭuppu Iraṇṭiṉāl nilattu nilam 1/320m Ut=tirat=tu maṉaiEṭuppu Uṭpaṭa 1/320 + 1/320 x val muṉpu Āḻvār kūṟāy Ivaṉ taṉvaḻiyāl Iṉnāyaṉārutāṉa nilam nikki Eṉṉutāṉa 1/320 x 1/2 + 1/320m Āka Eṉṉutāṉa maṉaiEṭuppu Uṭpaṭṭa 1/40 + � + 1/320 Iṉnilamā Araimā Araikkā
The inscription is incomplete at the right end.
Digital edition of SII 8.266 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
